metadata.title: ECHOES completed-catalog posterior products for BOSS DR12 CMASS-South
metadata.description:
Released data products of the ECHOES method for BOSS DR12 CMASS-South: a compact posterior over equal-weight, cosmology-free completed galaxy catalogs, a matching uniform-footprint random catalog, and a standalone NumPy sampler.

  • cmass_south_posterior.npz (2.0 MB) — the completion posterior: the 109,636 observed galaxies plus an inverse-CDF redshift posterior for each of the 6,777 spectroscopically-missing targets. Drawing seed s yields a complete equal-weight catalog of ~119,923 galaxies.
  • cmass_south_randoms.npz (4.6 MB) — 438,544 uniform-footprint randoms (RA, DEC, Z).
  • draw_samples.py — standalone sampler (NumPy only).

A reproducible ensemble is the set of integer seeds. See the code, documentation, and the paper at the related repository.

creators.name: Abel, Tom
creators.affiliation: Kavli Institute for Particle Astrophysics and Cosmology, Stanford University
